name: A Tasty Turkey Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Saltine crackers, or more if needed -- crumbled
1 Env ( 1 1/2 oz.) sloppy joe mix -- any brand
Salt and white pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly oil a 9x13-inch baking dish.
3. In a small bowl, combine the sauce ingredients and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine all the loaf ingredients and mix well.
5. Form the mixture into a loaf and place in the baking dish.
6. Brush the sauce evenly over the top.
7. Cover the dish with aluminum foil.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until done. Allow loaf to sit for 15 minutes before slicing.
